note: Same mechanism as data/seed/roster_overrides_nba.json: real contracts basketball-reference's own contracts pages haven't caught up to yet (brand-new free-agent signings and sign-and-trades won't appear on ANY team's bref page for weeks). Applied on top of the bref scrape in data/update_player_salaries.py by player_id. Remove an entry once bref's own data reflects it.

overrides.note: Average annual value of a 3yr/$47.4M deal signed 2026-07-06 (exact year-1 breakdown not publicly available at research time) — used as a single-season estimate.
1yr veteran-minimum contract signed 2026-07-03, filling the frontcourt void left by Mitchell Robinson's departure.
Year 1 of a 2yr/$28M deal signed 2026-07-07 (mid-level exception, team option on year 2); left the Lakers to sign with the Clippers as a free agent.
Year 1 of a 4yr/$130M sign-and-trade contract completed 2026-07-08 (Jazz sent Kessler to the Lakers for draft compensation).
